metadata.description: Function App system-assigned managed identity principal ID
APIM SKU name (Developer, BasicV2, StandardV2, etc.)
APIM-to-API shared secret for gateway validation

variables.$fxv#0:
<policies>
	<inbound>
		<base />
		<!-- Inject gateway secret header so the backend API can verify requests came through APIM -->
		<set-header name="X-Api-Gateway-Secret" exists-action="override">
			<value>{{apim-gateway-secret}}</value>
		</set-header>
		<!-- Determine cache duration based on endpoint -->
		<set-variable name="cacheDuration" value="@{
			if (context.Request.Method != "GET") { return 0; }
			var path = context.Request.Url.Path.ToLower();
			// Real-time weather: 2 min
			if (path.Contains("/metars") || path.Contains("/pireps")) { return 120; }
			// E6B GET endpoints use live METAR: 2 min
			if (path.Contains("/e6b/")) { return 120; }
			// Forecast weather, NOTAMs: 5 min
			if (path.Contains("/tafs") || path.Contains("/sigmets") || path.Contains("/g-airmets")) { return 300; }
			if (path.Contains("/notams")) { return 300; }
			// Winds aloft: 5 min
			if (path.Contains("/navlog/winds-aloft")) { return 300; }
			// Presigned URLs: 10 min
			if (path.Contains("/airport-diagrams") || path.Contains("/chart-supplements")) { return 600; }
			// NASR/static data: 15 min
			if (path.Contains("/airports") || path.Contains("/communication-frequencies")) { return 900; }
			if (path.Contains("/airspaces") || path.Contains("/obstacles") || path.Contains("/navaids")) { return 900; }
			return 0;
		}" />
		<!-- Build a deterministic cache key from the URL path + sorted query string -->
		<set-variable name="cacheKey" value="@{
			var key = context.Request.Url.Path;
			var query = context.Request.Url.Query;
			if (query != null && query.Count > 0) {
				var sorted = query
					.OrderBy(kvp => kvp.Key, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
					.SelectMany(kvp => kvp.Value.Select(v => kvp.Key + "=" + v));
				key += "|" + string.Join("&", sorted);
			}
			return key;
		}" />
		<!-- Check cache for cacheable GET requests -->
		<choose>
			<when condition="@((int)context.Variables["cacheDuration"] > 0)">
				<cache-lookup-value key="@((string)context.Variables["cacheKey"])" variable-name="cachedBody" caching-type="internal" />
				<choose>
					<when condition="@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("cachedBody"))">
						<!-- Cache hit: return cached body with fresh per-user rate-limit headers -->
						<return-response>
							<set-status code="200" reason="OK" />
							<set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
								<value>application/json</value>
							</set-header>
							<set-header name="X-RateLimit-Remaining" exists-action="override">
								<value>@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("rlRemaining") ? ((int)context.Variables["rlRemaining"]).ToString() : "")</value>
							</set-header>
							<set-header name="X-RateLimit-Limit" exists-action="override">
								<value>@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("rlLimit") ? (string)context.Variables["rlLimit"] : "")</value>
							</set-header>
							<set-body>@((string)context.Variables["cachedBody"])</set-body>
						</return-response>
					</when>
				</choose>
			</when>
		</choose>
	</inbound>
	<backend>
		<base />
	</backend>
	<outbound>
		<base />
		<!-- Strip the secret header from the response so it's never exposed to callers -->
		<set-header name="X-Api-Gateway-Secret" exists-action="delete" />
		<!-- Cache the response body for cacheable 200 responses -->
		<choose>
			<when condition="@(context.Variables.ContainsKey("cacheDuration") && (int)context.Variables["cacheDuration"] > 0 && context.Response.StatusCode == 200)">
				<cache-store-value key="@((string)context.Variables["cacheKey"])" value="@(context.Response.Body.As<string>(preserveContent: true))" duration="@((int)context.Variables["cacheDuration"])" caching-type="internal" />
			</when>
		</choose>
	</outbound>
	<on-error>
		<choose>
			<when condition="@(context.LastError.Source == "rate-limit-by-key")">
				<return-response>
					<set-status code="429" reason="Too Many Requests" />
					<set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
						<value>application/json</value>
					</set-header>
					<set-header name="Retry-After" exists-action="override">
						<value>@{
							var msg = context.LastError.Message ?? "";
							var match = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Match(msg, @"(\d+)\s*second");
							return match.Success ? match.Groups[1].Value : "60";
						}</value>
					</set-header>
					<set-body>@{
						var msg = context.LastError.Message ?? "";
						var match = System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Match(msg, @"(\d+)\s*second");
						var retryAfterSeconds = match.Success ? int.Parse(match.Groups[1].Value) : 60;
						return new JObject(
							new JProperty("code", "RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED"),
							new JProperty("message", "Too many requests. Please slow down and try again shortly."),
							new JProperty("retryAfterSeconds", retryAfterSeconds),
							new JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
							new JProperty("traceId", context.RequestId),
							new JProperty("path", context.Request.Url.Path)
						).ToString();
					}</set-body>
				</return-response>
			</when>
			<when condition="@(context.LastError.Source == "quota-by-key")">
				<return-response>
					<set-status code="429" reason="Quota Exceeded" />
					<set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
						<value>application/json</value>
					</set-header>
					<set-body>@{
						var msg = context.LastError.Message ?? "";
						var idx = msg.LastIndexOf("in ");
						var resetAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
						if (idx >= 0) {
							var tsPart = msg.Substring(idx + 3).TrimEnd('.');
							TimeSpan remaining;
							if (TimeSpan.TryParse(tsPart, out remaining)) {
								resetAt = DateTime.UtcNow.Add(remaining);
							}
						}
						return new JObject(
							new JProperty("code", "QUOTA_EXCEEDED"),
							new JProperty("message", "You have reached your monthly API call limit."),
							new JProperty("quotaResetsAt", resetAt.ToString("o")),
							new JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
							new JProperty("traceId", context.RequestId),
							new JProperty("path", context.Request.Url.Path)
						).ToString();
					}</set-body>
				</return-response>
			</when>
			<when condition="@(context.LastError.Source == "forward-request")">
				<return-response>
					<set-status code="502" reason="Bad Gateway" />
					<set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
						<value>application/json</value>
					</set-header>
					<set-body>@{
						return new JObject(
							new JProperty("code", "BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE"),
							new JProperty("message", "Backend service is unreachable. Please try again later."),
							new JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
							new JProperty("traceId", context.RequestId),
							new JProperty("path", context.Request.Url.Path)
						).ToString();
					}</set-body>
				</return-response>
			</when>
			<otherwise>
				<return-response>
					<set-status code="@{
						var sc = context.Response.StatusCode;
						return (sc >= 400 && sc < 600) ? sc : 500;
					}" reason="@(context.Response.StatusReason ?? "Internal Server Error")" />
					<set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
						<value>application/json</value>
					</set-header>
					<set-body>@{
						var statusCode = context.Response.StatusCode;
						string code;
						string message;
						if (statusCode == 401) {
							code = "UNAUTHORIZED";
							message = "Invalid or missing API key.";
						} else {
							code = "INTERNAL_ERROR";
							message = context.LastError.Message ?? "An unexpected gateway error occurred.";
						}
						return new JObject(
							new JProperty("code", code),
							new JProperty("message", message),
							new JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
							new JProperty("traceId", context.RequestId),
							new JProperty("path", context.Request.Url.Path)
						).ToString();
					}</set-body>
				</return-response>
			</otherwise>
		</choose>
		<base />
	</on-error>
</policies>
variables.$fxv#1:
<policies>
	<inbound>
		<base />
		<set-variable name="rlLimit" value="10" />
		<rate-limit-by-key calls="@(int.Parse((string)context.Variables["rlLimit"]))" renewal-period="60" counter-key="@(context.Subscription?.Key ?? "anonymous")" remaining-calls-header-name="X-RateLimit-Remaining" total-calls-header-name="X-RateLimit-Limit" retry-after-header-name="Retry-After" remaining-calls-variable-name="rlRemaining" />
		<quota-by-key calls="5000" renewal-period="2628000" counter-key="@{
			var key = context.Subscription?.Key ?? "anonymous";
			var name = context.Subscription?.Name ?? "";
			var sep = name.LastIndexOf('|');
			var epoch = sep >= 0 ? name.Substring(sep + 1) : "0";
			return key + "|" + epoch;
		}" />
		<!-- Endpoint gating: Free tier only allows basic weather and airports -->
		<set-variable name="is-allowed" value="@{
			var path = context.Request.Url.Path.ToLower();
			var allowedPrefixes = new[] {
				"/api/v1/metars",
				"/api/v1/tafs",
				"/api/v1/airports",
				"/api/v1/runways",
				"/api/v1/communication-frequencies"
			};
			return allowedPrefixes.Any(p => path.StartsWith(p));
		}" />
		<choose>
			<when condition="@(!context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<bool>("is-allowed"))">
				<return-response>
					<set-status code="403" reason="Forbidden" />
					<set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
						<value>application/json</value>
					</set-header>
					<set-body>@{
    return new JObject(
        new JProperty("code", "TIER_RESTRICTED"),
        new JProperty("message", "This endpoint is not available on the Free tier. Please upgrade to Starter or higher."),
        new JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
        new JProperty("traceId", context.RequestId),
        new JProperty("path", context.Request.Url.Path)
    ).ToString();
}</set-body>
				</return-response>
			</when>
		</choose>
	</inbound>
	<backend>
		<base />
	</backend>
	<outbound>
		<base />
	</outbound>
	<on-error>
		<base />
	</on-error>
</policies>
variables.$fxv#2:
<policies>
	<inbound>
		<base />
		<set-variable name="rlLimit" value="60" />
		<rate-limit-by-key calls="@(int.Parse((string)context.Variables["rlLimit"]))" renewal-period="60" counter-key="@(context.Subscription?.Key ?? "anonymous")" remaining-calls-header-name="X-RateLimit-Remaining" total-calls-header-name="X-RateLimit-Limit" retry-after-header-name="Retry-After" remaining-calls-variable-name="rlRemaining" />
		<quota-by-key calls="150000" renewal-period="2628000" counter-key="@{
			var key = context.Subscription?.Key ?? "anonymous";
			var name = context.Subscription?.Name ?? "";
			var sep = name.LastIndexOf('|');
			var epoch = sep >= 0 ? name.Substring(sep + 1) : "0";
			return key + "|" + epoch;
		}" />
		<!-- Endpoint gating: Starter tier blocks navlog, NOTAMs, diagrams, chart supplements, E6B, and navaids -->
		<set-variable name="is-blocked" value="@{
			var path = context.Request.Url.Path.ToLower();
			var blockedPrefixes = new[] {
				"/api/v1/navlog",
				"/api/v1/notams",
				"/api/v1/airport-diagrams",
				"/api/v1/chart-supplements",
				"/api/v1/e6b",
				"/api/v1/navaids"
			};
			return blockedPrefixes.Any(p => path.StartsWith(p));
		}" />
		<choose>
			<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault<bool>("is-blocked"))">
				<return-response>
					<set-status code="403" reason="Forbidden" />
					<set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override">
						<value>application/json</value>
					</set-header>
					<set-body>@{
    return new JObject(
        new JProperty("code", "TIER_RESTRICTED"),
        new JProperty("message", "This endpoint is not available on the Starter tier. Please upgrade to Professional or higher."),
        new JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
        new JProperty("traceId", context.RequestId),
        new JProperty("path", context.Request.Url.Path)
    ).ToString();
}</set-body>
				</return-response>
			</when>
		</choose>
	</inbound>
	<backend>
		<base />
	</backend>
	<outbound>
		<base />
	</outbound>
	<on-error>
		<base />
	</on-error>
</policies>

<policies>
	<inbound>
		<base />
		<set-variable name="rlLimit" value="300" />
		<rate-limit-by-key calls="@(int.Parse((string)context.Variables["rlLimit"]))" renewal-period="60" counter-key="@(context.Subscription?.Key ?? "anonymous")" remaining-calls-header-name="X-RateLimit-Remaining" total-calls-header-name="X-RateLimit-Limit" retry-after-header-name="Retry-After" remaining-calls-variable-name="rlRemaining" />
		<quota-by-key calls="750000" renewal-period="2628000" counter-key="@{
			var key = context.Subscription?.Key ?? "anonymous";
			var name = context.Subscription?.Name ?? "";
			var sep = name.LastIndexOf('|');
			var epoch = sep >= 0 ? name.Substring(sep + 1) : "0";
			return key + "|" + epoch;
		}" />
		<!-- No endpoint gating: Professional tier has access to all endpoints -->
	</inbound>
	<backend>
		<base />
	</backend>
	<outbound>
		<base />
	</outbound>
	<on-error>
		<base />
	</on-error>
</policies>

		<quota-by-key calls="2000000" renewal-period="2628000" counter-key="@{

			return key + "|" + epoch;
		}" />
		<!-- No endpoint gating: ATP tier has access to all endpoints -->
	</inbound>
	<backend>

	<on-error>

	</on-error>
</policies>

properties.description: Free tier — basic weather and airport data
Starter tier — weather, airports, airspace, and more
Professional tier — full access to all endpoints
Enterprise tier — full access to all endpoints with highest limits

metadata.description: Storage account name for blob data
Principal ID of the Web App managed identity
Principal ID of the Function App managed identity
Principal ID of the GitHub deployment identity (optional)
Key Vault name for RBAC assignments
PostgreSQL server name for RBAC assignments
APIM service name for RBAC assignments
Log Analytics workspace name for RBAC assignments
APIM service principal ID for frontend management (optional)
Function App Application Insights connection string
